notes.title: Evidence scope
notes.text: SEAT UK sources confirm UK presence; Autel confirms only APB300 working-key Add Key coverage for the stated years.

notes.title: Variant policy
notes.text: Keyed and KESSY/keyless variants remain separate and unresolved until exact key/dashboard evidence is recorded.

notes.title: Shared architecture
notes.text: MQB context is reused only at platform level; no Volkswagen RHD location, wiring or AKL procedure is inherited.
